product_scope.product: AI workflow builder for local project automation

intent_detection.developer_intent: bootstrap a fresh product kernel from product intent and ICP research
intent_detection.product_intent: help technical builders turn ambiguous product ideas into governed implementation workflows

routing.reason: taste files are missing, so the route uses tastebootstrap semantics after intent and ICP research

deepresearch_plan.stop_condition: fresh kernel and ICP are specific enough to validate

cited.claim_supported: customer jobs, pains, and gains should drive fit

stable_foundations: Jobs to Be Done as stable product-discovery foundation

claim_ledger.claim: The best-fit user needs confidence that the agent will preserve product intent while executing.
claim_ledger.label: current-source-backed
claim_ledger.taste_impact: Experience promise should prioritize obvious, reversible, evidence-backed work.

parallel_decision.why_not_more: four lenses covered the decision-relevant uncertainty

primary.segment: technical founders starting a serious AI-assisted product repo
primary.buyer_user_distinction: the founder is both buyer and daily operator
primary.job_to_be_done: convert a product idea into a governed build kernel before implementation begins
primary.buyer_context: owner-operator with authority over local tooling
primary.adoption_channel: Claude Code project skill in an empty folder
disqualifiers: users who do not want an operating kernel

anti_icp: teams that want prompt-to-code output with no discovery or verification

likely_mistakes: overfitting the initial ICP to one implementation idea
